title: astragalus repentinus
intro: Astragalus repentinus, also known as Mexican milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus repentinus include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herb among health enthusiasts. Astragalus repentinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
